text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... I wasn't even close to winning!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry, Trainer. Today just wasn't it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You put in all that time and effort to make a
training plan for me, but I still bombed it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I sure let us both down, running the way I did
today...
choice_data_list: Don't be too hard on yourself.
Don't be too hard on yourself.
You're fine just the way you are!
You're fine just the way you are!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I sure let us both down, running the way I did
today...
choice_data_list: Don't be too hard on yourself.
Don't be too hard on yourself.
You're fine just the way you are!
You're fine just the way you are!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Ahaha. Yeah, you're right. I shouldn't be. I'm
not doing either of us any favors by being all
down in the dumps.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right... No more doom and gloom. I still have
reason to keep going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
After all, I still remember how fun and freeing it is
to be at the top!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ah! Yeah... What have I been saying?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry. For real, I'm sorry. I nearly forgot what
you taught me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, forgetting that's, like, a million times worse
than just losing a race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep running my way until I reach the
very top!
